I really don’t get how this movie will work.
A direct adaptation of the games seems unwise or impossible. The game is simply too big, the protagonist is silent, and so much of the lore is hidden or tucked away.
My best guess is that they’d be adapting some parts of the lore. There is a lot of compelling stuff that fans and people unfamiliar with Elden Ring could be enticed by. But early set photos seem to show it is set during the events of the game, so I don’t know how likely it is.
Alex Garland seems passionate about it, and he’s experienced; but how much does that all matter if the inherent setup is flawed? I’d like to be hopeful, I just don’t know.

Ah but if I use the consumables now and then fail when the boss is at 60% health I won't have those consumables later when they could make the difference between victory and death.
